Meet the doctor

Dr. Siddharth Mehta

MDS | Founder & Lead Consultant, Dr. Siddharth's Dental Care

With over 8 years of clinical experience, Dr. Siddharth Mehta brings a rare combination of microscopic precision and genuine clinical warmth to every treatment. As the founder of Dr. Siddharth's Dental Care — located at Sun Gravitas, Shyamal Cross Road, Ahmedabad — he has built a premier practice where cutting-edge technology meets elite patient comfort.

Holding both BDS and MDS degrees, Dr. Siddharth is a highly specialised dental surgeon who leverages CBCT 3D imaging, digital laser dentistry and in-house 3D printing for every patient.

Dental ImplantsLaser Dentistry Smile DesignMicro-Endodontics Oral Cancer Screening3D CBCT Imaging TMJ TreatmentOrthodontics

Clinical expertise

Specialised Skills

🦷 Advanced Implantology

Computer-guided dental implant placements using CBCT 3D planning. Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that last a lifetime.

⚡ Laser Dentistry

Minimally invasive laser treatments for gums, cavities and whitening. Faster healing, less discomfort, no stitches in most cases.

🔬 Micro-Endodontics (RCT)

High-precision root canal treatments using rotary instruments. Conservative approach that saves your natural tooth structure.

😁 Smile Design

Digital smile design technology that shows you the result before treatment begins. Veneers, bonding and full smile makeovers.

🔍 Pathology & Early Detection

Oral cancer screenings, precancerous lesion evaluations and comprehensive TMJ disorder management.

📐 Orthodontics

Traditional braces and clear aligners for all ages. Personalised treatment plans for every patient's unique case.
